Executing!
Description:
  Generate a class with a template

Usage:
  CodeGeneratorCLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init            Installs the template files to the designated directory.
  custom          Generate a files based on custom entities in the current directory.
  buildtemplates  Generate template files from existing repo.

Executing!
Description:
  Generate a files based on custom entities in the current directory.

Usage:
  CodeGeneratorCLI custom [options]

Options:
  --template-path <template-path>  The path of the template.
  --name <name>                    The name of the generated file without extension.
  --prularname <prularname>        The prular name of the generated file.
  --param <param>                  Arbitrary key-value parameters. Use format: key=value. Every parameter will represent a model property in cshtml file.
  --settings-file <settings-file>  The settings JSON file.
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
